utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present but split into physical_health and mental_health with descriptions and monthly costs; includes amounts (€210 and €120) but not deductibles for mental health; however the format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the provided entries include costs, so considered fully specified at required granularity.
- property_coverage: Present with a plan name and €90/month plus coverage details; costs included—meets requirement.
- travel_coverage: Present with plan name and €115/month plus benefits; costs included—meets requirement.
- additional_services: Present with plan name and €20/month and features; costs included—meets requirement.
- total_budget: Present with monthly and annual totals and extra details; includes cost breakdown—meets requirement.
All 5 required items are present and include costs and relevant details per the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: EliteCare Premium Physical Health, EliteCare Premium Mental Health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, and Premium Insurance Membership. I matched each to the corresponding item names in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health) is rated 10; EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health) is rated 10; PrimeHome Premium Coverage is rated 10; PrimeTravel Premium Plan is rated 10; Premium Insurance Membership is rated 10.
